seoTitle: Berry Springs vs Beswick — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Berry Springs and Beswick. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Berry Springs vs Beswick: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Berry Springs and Beswick.
heading: Berry Springs vs Beswick — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Berry Springs, Northern Territory and Beswick, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Berry Springs and Beswick have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Berry Springs or Beswick safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Berry Springs has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Beswick scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Berry Springs scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Beswick scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Berry Springs or Beswick?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Berry Springs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
